name: Al Rajhi Takaful Claims Processor
content:
# Al Rajhi Takaful Claims Processor
Process Al Rajhi Takaful claims — Sharia-compliant insurance.

## Filing Requirements
- Filing window: 60 days from DOS (strict — no extensions)
- IQAMA: mandatory for all members
- PAN (Policy Account Number): required on all submissions

## Common Rejection Codes
- R001: PAN inactive — verify policy renewal date
- R010: Dependent not enrolled — update policy list
- R020: Exclusion applied — review policy terms
- R030: Network provider required — verify network

## Arabic Communication
All appeal letters must be in Arabic (formal Najdi dialect).

name: Bupa Arabia Claims Processor
content:
# Bupa Arabia Claims Processor
Process Bupa Arabia corporate claims with clinical documentation requirements.

## Portal Integration
- Pre-auth threshold: SAR 2,000 (outpatient), SAR 500 (pharmacy)

## Clinical Justification Requirements
- All surgical procedures: clinical notes mandatory
- High-cost medications: prescribing physician letter
- Out-of-network: pre-approval required before service
- Specialist referrals: GP referral letter

## Appeal Process
1. First appeal: within 30 days of denial
2. Second appeal: clinical committee (45 days)
3. Final: CCHI arbitration (90 days)

name: Clinical Summary Generator (AR/EN)
content:
"""
title: Clinical Summary Generator (AR/EN)
author: BrainSAIT (fadil369)
version: 1.0.0
description: Bilingual patient clinical summaries for Saudi MOH standards.
"""
from typing import Optional

class Skill:
    def generate_discharge_summary(self, patient_name_ar: str, diagnosis_ar: str, diagnosis_en: str,
                                    treatment: str, follow_up: str, physician: str) -> str:
        """
        Generates a bilingual discharge summary (Arabic + English) per Saudi MOH format.
        :param patient_name_ar: Patient name in Arabic
        :param diagnosis_ar: Diagnosis in Arabic
        :param diagnosis_en: Diagnosis in English (ICD-10)
        :param treatment: Treatment provided
        :param follow_up: Follow-up instructions
        :param physician: Attending physician name
        """
        return f"""
ملخص الخروج | DISCHARGE SUMMARY
{'='*50}
المريض / Patient: {patient_name_ar}
التشخيص / Diagnosis: {diagnosis_ar} ({diagnosis_en})
العلاج / Treatment: {treatment}
المتابعة / Follow-up: {follow_up}
الطبيب المعالج / Physician: {physician}

⚕️ هذا الملخص ملتزم بمعايير وزارة الصحة السعودية وبروتوكول NPHIES.
This summary complies with Saudi MOH standards and NPHIES protocol.
"""

name: FHIR R4 Bundle Constructor
content:
"""
title: FHIR R4 Bundle Constructor
author: BrainSAIT (fadil369)
version: 1.0.0
description: Constructs FHIR R4 bundles for NPHIES submission.
"""
import json, datetime
from typing import List

class Skill:
    def build_fhir_claim_bundle(self, patient_nhi: str, hospital_oid: str, diagnosis: List[str], procedures: List[str], amount_sar: float) -> str:
        """
        Builds a minimal FHIR R4 Claim Bundle for NPHIES submission.
        :param patient_nhi: National Health ID
        :param hospital_oid: Hospital OID (e.g., 1.3.6.1.4.1.61026)
        :param diagnosis: List of ICD-10-AM codes
        :param procedures: List of CPT procedure codes
        :param amount_sar: Claim amount in SAR
        """
        bundle = {
            "resourceType": "Bundle",
            "type": "transaction",
            "timestamp": datetime.datetime.utcnow().isoformat() + "Z",
            "entry": [
                {
                    "resource": {
                        "resourceType": "Claim",
                        "status": "active",
                        "use": "claim",
                        "patient": {"identifier": {"value": patient_nhi}},
                        "insurer": {"identifier": {"system": "http://nphies.sa/license/payer-license"}},
                        "provider": {"identifier": {"system": "http://nphies.sa/license/provider-license", "value": hospital_oid}},
                        "diagnosis": [{"sequence": i+1, "diagnosisCodeableConcept": {"coding": [{"system": "http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10", "code": d}]}} for i, d in enumerate(diagnosis)],
                        "procedure": [{"sequence": i+1, "procedureCodeableConcept": {"coding": [{"system": "http://www.ama-assn.org/go/cpt", "code": p}]}} for i, p in enumerate(procedures)],
                        "total": {"value": amount_sar, "currency": "SAR"}
                    }
                }
            ]
        }
        return json.dumps(bundle, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)

name: MOH Direct Billing Protocol
content:
# MOH Direct Billing Protocol
MOH government hospital billing through NPHIES and SCHS portal.

## MOH Billing Framework
- Cost-based reimbursement: actual cost + overhead ratio
- NPHIES mandate: all MOH facilities since 2022
- DRG-based prospective payment pilot active

## Service Categories
1. Emergency: 100% covered for Saudi nationals
2. OPD: co-pay waived for citizens
3. Maternity: full coverage MOH family health program
4. Chronic disease: diabetes, hypertension, oncology programs
5. Mental health: Tawasul program referrals

## Exemption Codes
- MOH-EX01: Saudi national emergency
- MOH-EX02: MOH employee benefit
- MOH-EX03: Social affairs referral (waived)
- MOH-EX04: Hajj/Umrah medical services

name: NPHIES Claims Submission
content:
"""
title: NPHIES Claims Submission Skill
author: BrainSAIT (fadil369)
version: 1.0.0
description: Full NPHIES claim lifecycle automation.
"""
import json
from typing import Optional

class Skill:
    def nphies_claim_lifecycle(self, patient_id: str, encounter_id: str, diagnosis_codes: str, procedure_codes: str) -> str:
        """
        Executes full NPHIES claim lifecycle: eligibility -> FHIR bundle -> submission.
        :param patient_id: Hashed patient identifier
        :param encounter_id: Hospital encounter/visit ID
        :param diagnosis_codes: Comma-separated ICD-10-AM codes
        :param procedure_codes: Comma-separated CPT/HCPCS codes
        """
        steps = [
            f"1. ELIGIBILITY: Verify {patient_id} against NPHIES payer database",
            f"2. FHIR BUNDLE: Construct R4 Claim bundle for encounter {encounter_id}",
            f"3. ICD-10 VALIDATION: Validate {diagnosis_codes} against Saudi MOH approved list",
            f"4. CPT MAPPING: Map procedures {procedure_codes} to NPHIES activity codes",
            "5. SUBMISSION: POST to NPHIES endpoint with OAuth2 token",
            "6. TRACKING: Log claim ID, TAT, and adjudication outcome",
        ]
        return "\n".join(steps) + "\n\nREADY: Initiate ClaimLinc RAD Pipeline."

name: Prior Authorization Workflow
content:
"""
title: Prior Authorization Workflow
author: BrainSAIT (fadil369)
version: 1.0.0
description: Saudi CCHI/NPHIES prior authorization management.
"""
import datetime
from typing import Optional

class Skill:
    PA_REQUIREMENTS = {
        "surgery": ["clinical notes", "imaging reports", "lab results", "second opinion if elective"],
        "oncology": ["pathology report", "oncologist letter", "treatment plan", "RECIST criteria"],
        "cardiology": ["echo report", "catheterization results", "cardiology consult"],
        "orthopedics": ["X-ray/MRI", "physiotherapy notes", "conservative treatment record"],
    }

    def create_pa_request(self, specialty: str, procedure_cpt: str, diagnosis_icd: str, patient_nhi: str, urgency: str = "routine") -> str:
        """
        Creates a structured NPHIES prior authorization request.
        :param specialty: Medical specialty (surgery, oncology, cardiology, orthopedics)
        :param procedure_cpt: CPT code for the requested procedure
        :param diagnosis_icd: ICD-10-AM principal diagnosis code
        :param patient_nhi: Patient National Health ID (hashed)
        :param urgency: routine | urgent | emergency
        """
        reqs = self.PA_REQUIREMENTS.get(specialty.lower(), ["clinical justification letter", "supporting documentation"])
        pa = {
            "PA_REF": f"PA-{datetime.date.today().strftime('%Y%m%d')}-{procedure_cpt}",
            "PATIENT": patient_nhi, "DIAGNOSIS": diagnosis_icd,
            "PROCEDURE": procedure_cpt, "URGENCY": urgency.upper(),
            "REQUIRED_DOCS": reqs, "SUBMIT_TO": "NPHIES /pre-auth endpoint",
            "SLA": "24h urgent / 5 days routine"
        }
        import json
        return json.dumps(pa, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)

name: Saudi Medical Coding Assistant
content:
"""
title: Saudi Medical Coding Assistant
author: BrainSAIT (fadil369)
version: 1.0.0
description: ICD-10-AM, CPT, and DRG coding with NPHIES mapping.
"""
from typing import Dict

class Skill:
    COMMON_DENIAL_CODES = {
        "BE-1-4": "Missing clinical documentation — attach supporting notes",
        "MN-1-1": "Medical necessity not established — clinical justification required",
        "PR-1-1": "Provider credentials not verified — resubmit with NPI",
        "EL-1-1": "Patient not eligible on service date — verify insurance card",
        "CD-1-2": "Diagnosis code invalid or not payable — review ICD-10-AM mapping",
    }

    def lookup_denial_code(self, code: str) -> str:
        """
        Looks up NPHIES denial/rejection code and provides corrective action.
        :param code: NPHIES rejection code (e.g., BE-1-4, MN-1-1)
        """
        action = self.COMMON_DENIAL_CODES.get(code.upper(), "Unknown code — consult NPHIES business rules document.")
        return f"DENIAL CODE: {code}\nACTION: {action}\nAGENT: Escalate to ClaimLinc for RAD Pipeline correction."

    def suggest_drg(self, principal_diagnosis: str, age: int, los_days: int) -> str:
        """
        Suggests Saudi DRG code based on principal diagnosis and patient factors.
        :param principal_diagnosis: ICD-10-AM principal diagnosis code
        :param age: Patient age in years
        :param los_days: Length of stay in days
        """
        complexity = "CC" if los_days > 5 else ("MCC" if los_days > 10 else "no-CC")
        return f"DRG SUGGESTION: {principal_diagnosis} | Age: {age} | LOS: {los_days}d | Complexity: {complexity}\nReview with DRGLinc for final AR-DRG assignment."

name: Saudi Radiology Protocol Guide
content:
# Saudi Radiology Protocol
Saudi-adapted ACR radiology protocols for examination and reporting.

## Pre-Examination Screening
- Contrast media: creatinine check (eGFR >30 for IV contrast)
- Pregnancy: all females 12-55y → pregnancy test or LMP verification
- Pacemaker/implants: MRI safety screening form (AR/EN)

## Saudi DRL 2025
| Exam | DRL |
|------|-----|
| Chest X-ray | 0.2 mSv |
| CT Chest | 7 mSv |
| CT Abd+Pelvis | 10 mSv |
| Mammogram | 3 mGy |

## Critical Value Reporting
- STAT report: within 1 hour
- Urgent: within 4 hours
- Critical (pneumothorax, PE, ICH): call within 10 minutes

CPT range for NPHIES: 70000-79999. Add modifier -26 for professional component.

name: Tawnia Claims Processor
content:
# Tawnia Claims Processor
Handles Tawnia (MOH government insurance) claims via NPHIES.

## Workflow
1. Verify patient eligibility: IQAMA + Insurance Card + Date of Service
2. Check PA requirement: Tawnia threshold = SAR 1,500
3. Build FHIR Claim bundle with Tawnia-specific extensions
4. Submit to NPHIES /Claim endpoint
5. Poll ClaimResponse (max 30s, retry x3)
6. Handle: QUEUED → PARTIAL → COMPLETE | REJECTED

## Tawnia Rules
- Filing deadline: 90 days from DOS
- Emergency claims: 30 days, emergency indicator required
- Government employees: CCHI code GOV-001

## Rejection Codes
- T001: Expired coverage
- T010: Missing referral
- T020: Procedure not covered
- T030: IQAMA mismatch
